mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stats_event ( occurred_at, event_type, preview_key, provider_id, http_status, cache_hit, ai_requested, ai_succeeded, source_url, requested_style, actual_style, ai_provider_names, ai_duration_ms, crawl_duration_ms, duration_ms, client_type, error_code ) VALUES ( #{occurredAt}, #{eventType}, #{previewKey}, #{providerId}, #{httpStatus}, #{cacheHit}, #{aiRequested}, #{aiSucceeded}, #{sourceUrl}, #{requestedStyle}, #{actualStyle}, #{aiProviderNames}, #{aiDurationMs}, #{crawlDurationMs}, #{durationMs}, #{clientType}, #{errorCode} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM stats_link WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stats_event event WHERE event.preview_key = stats_link.preview_key )
